title: ononis viscosa var. brachycarpa
intro: Ononis viscosa var. brachycarpa, also known as sticky wild candytuft, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Ononis viscosa var. brachycarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
